assertions.reason: Second signup attempt with the same email stayed on the signup page, showed 'Could not create account', and did not authenticate the user.
evidence: Visible page text after the duplicate signup attempt included 'Could not create account' and the URL remained http://localhost:5180/signup?redirect=%2Fstudies.
Console recorded Convex auth rejection: 'Account already exists'.

assertions.reason: An authenticated refresh showed a centered 'Loading…' state before the authenticated settings shell rendered, with no login-form flash captured.
evidence: Refresh video frames 01-05 show only a centered 'Loading…' message; frame 06 shows the authenticated /settings shell. No page errors were reported during the refresh capture.
